## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles with `cargo check --all-features`
- [ ] No clippy warnings with `cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Code is formatted with `cargo fmt`
- [ ] Individual feature builds pass (if modified platform code)
- [ ] Updated README if API changed
- [ ] Added/updated tests if applicable
